name: IC-DISC Inter-company Pricing Optimization

eligibility.description: Businesses selling export property to a related DISC or using a DISC as a commission agent for export sales.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can choose between three pricing methods (4% of gross receipts, 50% of combined taxable income, or Section 482 arm's length) to maximize the amount of income shifted to the tax-exempt DISC.
